content: IMPORTANT: When you reach the testing step, do NOT run the full test suite with a long timeout. Many integration tests hang because they need live Postgres/Redis/IBKR connections that aren't available in this worktree. Instead: 1) Run only unit tests: `PYTHONPATH="..:." python -m pytest tests/unit/ -v --tb=short --timeout=30 -x` (note the --timeout=30 flag). 2) Skip any test that imports from integrations.bittensor.scheduler or broker.ibkr. 3) Mark hanging tests with @pytest.mark.integration and document which tests were skipped. 4) Do NOT wait more than 2 minutes for any single pytest run.
